mechanism_narrative: A decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate for future corporate earnings, directly increasing present equity valuations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.2 percentage points over three months signals deteriorating labor market conditions and weakening consumer demand, triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 65% of triggered instances despite the unemployment spike.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates broad-based consumer demand strength, which drives corporate revenue growth and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict positive returns when either series deviates from its 12-month moving average by more than 1 standard deviation.

mechanism_narrative: An upward revision in the index of industrial production reflects immediate supply-side momentum that translates into short-term positive market sentiment and S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for INDPRO momentum drops below 0.01 during periods where FEDFUNDS increases by > 0.5% in a single month.

mechanism_narrative: When the consumer price index exceeds the 250.0 threshold, persistent inflationary pressures force central banks to maintain restrictive policy, compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns remain positive in > 70% of months where CPIAUCSL stays above 250.0.

mechanism_narrative: A divergence where total nonfarm payrolls decline while the unemployment rate simultaneously rises indicates structural labor market deterioration, which suppresses earnings expectations and yields negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The divergence signal shows no predictive power (Rank IC < 0.03) over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter growth in real GDP reflects underlying economic expansion that supports corporate profit margins, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth shows zero or negative correlation with 5-day forward SPX returns across multiple business cycles.

mechanism_narrative: Two consecutive monthly declines in industrial production signal a contraction in manufacturing output that precedes earnings downgrades and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the production decline.
